name: SHISA
description: Bnbtopia's peace was shaken by reemergence of an ancient threat from depths of universe. Rumors of remnants of evil spirits, a mysterious energy source, and an unknown weapon spread across Bnbtopia. This shadowy menace slipped through cracks in reality, fracturing system balance and weakening unity. At that moment, a legendary creature part lion & dog appeared in sky. From a heaven washed in light emerged mythical guardian SHISA. Beside him stood Shiba, brave warrior from Land of Imagination, holding a radiant sacred sword, brows furrowed in fierce resolve. Together, they became last hope of Bnbtopia against $PEPE.
